data.current_description: Creates a secure QR code with specified data, format, and scheme type. Supports PDC (Plain Data Code), EDC (Embedded Document Code), and HDC (Hosted Document Code) schemes.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate secure QR code with specified scheme
data.description_suggestion: Creates a secure QR code with specified data, format, and scheme type. Supports three encoding schemes: PDC (Plain Data Code) for basic data, EDC (Embedded Document Code) for embedded documents, and HDC (Hosted Document Code) for hosted documents. Requires bearer token authentication. Returns a QRCodeGenerateResponse containing the generated QR code image, metadata, and validation details. The QR code is immediately available for use and can be embedded in applications or printed.
